title: ARES: Alternating Reinforcement Learning and Supervised Fine-Tuning for Enhanced Multi-Modal Chain-of-Thought Reasoning Through Diverse AI Feedback
key_challenges: Ranking-based feedback issues in RLHF and RLAIF
Instability in RL process requiring extensive hyperparameter tuning
proposed_solution: Alternating RL and SFT with sentence-level feedback from an AI Teacher

results.accuracy_improvement: 2.5% increase in inference answer accuracy on average for multi-modal datasets
